steps.title: Locate the researchers' conclusion
steps.content: At the end of the passage, the researchers directly state their conclusion: small changes to the app could reduce plastic waste in China by up to 3.26 million metric tons annually.

steps.title: Match the conclusion to a choice
steps.content: Choice D directly expresses this conclusion—small app changes can greatly lower plastic waste. The other three either contradict the finding, describe information not examined in the passage, or mischaracterize what caused the effect. That matches choice D — D is correct.
